title: The Thursday Murder Club
author: Richard Osman
blurb: Four retirees meet weekly to solve cold cases — until a real murder lands on their doorstep.

title: Starter Villain
author: John Scalzi
blurb: Inheriting your uncle's supervillain empire is more complicated than it sounds. Especially with the unionizing cats.

title: The Frozen River
author: Ariel Lawhon
blurb: A midwife and magistrate's widow investigates a murder in 1789 Maine. Based on a true story.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
blurb: A lone astronaut must save Earth — if only he could remember who he is.

title: The No. 1 Ladies' Detective Agency
author: Alexander McCall Smith
blurb: Botswana's first female detective opens for business. Charming and warmly observed.

title: Mexican Gothic
author: Silvia Moreno-Garcia
blurb: A glamorous socialite investigates her cousin's eerie letters from a crumbling mansion in 1950s Mexico.

title: A Memory Called Empire
author: Arkady Martine
blurb: An ambassador from a small space station must navigate the politics of a vast empire — while carrying a dead man's memories.

title: Tom Clancy Red Winter
author: Marc Cameron
blurb: A CIA officer and KGB colonel race to prevent a Cold War crisis from going hot.

title: The Locked Door
author: Freida McFadden
blurb: A surgeon with a dark past discovers someone knows her secret — and is coming for her.

title: Dark Matter
author: Blake Crouch
blurb: A physicist is kidnapped and wakes up in a life that isn't his. Fast-paced and mind-bending.
